title: centaurea duvauxii
intro: Centaurea duvauxii is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and feathery leaves. Traditionally, Centaurea duvauxii has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are rich in flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Centaurea duvauxii is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
